title: Battle Arts API
description: The API Mod that started it all
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf710eb22dd75ffd883e5a679ec810e16710c230.png)

This mods requires 20.10 beta versions of Epic Figth which is not posted onto CF yet.

This is part of the API split from Epic Fight Battle Arts, You will need this for Battle Arts to function at all.

Allows mod devs to make their own battle styles and combat arts without the content I brought to the table.
